title: cyrtomium caryotideum var. papyraceum
intro: Cyrtomium caryotideum var. papyraceum, also known as the Paper Fern, is a variety of the Cyrtomium fern, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyrtomium caryotideum var. papyraceum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, often used to create teas, tinctures, and other medicinal preparations.
